gist.headline: Audio gear goes to Sweden
gist.blurb: Moved gpt-audio-mini to a new Azure deployment. Less API keys to juggle, more organized soundwaves.
gist.summary: Migrated the gpt-audio-mini model to the consolidated myceli-prod-swedencentral Azure deployment.
gist.impact: Streamlines backend infrastructure by consolidating audio models under a single Azure account and shared API key.
gist.visual_concept: Moving audio equipment to a new server. Polly the bee carrying a tiny boombox or audio cassette to a new server rack. Nomnom creature eating old API keys.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot carrying a tiny retro boombox towards a glowing new server rack. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats old API key printouts nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
